# DumbRoof

> DumbRoof is AI-powered insurance claim supplement software for roofing contractors — turn roof inspection photos and carrier scopes into forensic causation reports, Xactimate-style estimates, and supplement packages in minutes.

## Product
DumbRoof generates a forensic-grade insurance claim package from source documents (carrier scope, roof measurements, inspection photos). Each package includes a forensic causation report with annotated photos, an Xactimate-style estimate with building-code citations, a carrier scope comparison, and supplement documentation — produced in roughly 15 minutes. Contractors, public adjusters, and attorneys use it to identify missed, underpriced, and code-required line items and recover what claims actually owe.

## Guides
- [What Is Hail Damage? Identification, Insurance Claims & Documentation](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/what-is-hail-damage): What hail damage is, how it shows up on shingles, metal, slate, and membrane roofs, and how to document it for a claim.
- [What Is Wind Damage? How to Identify, Document & File Insurance Claims](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/what-is-wind-damage): How to recognize creased, lifted, and missing shingles from wind, and document the loss carriers respect.
- [What Does Hail Damage Look Like on Asphalt Shingles?](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/hail-damage-to-asphalt-shingles): Identifying circular bruises, granule loss, and exposed mat on asphalt shingles, with real claim photos.
- [Hail Damage to Metal Roofing: Identification & Insurance Claims](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/hail-damage-to-metal-roofing): The functional-vs-cosmetic debate on metal roofs, how to document dents, and how to win the claim.
- [Hail Damage to Slate Roofs: Identification, Repair & Insurance Claims](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/hail-damage-to-slate-roofs): Why slate fractures rather than bruises, how to spot fresh breaks, and the unique insurance challenges.
- [Hail Damage to TPO Roofing: Identification Signs & Commercial Claim Guide](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/hail-damage-to-tpo-roofing): Reading concentric fractures and star cracks in TPO membrane and supplementing commercial claims.
- [Hail Damage to EPDM Roofing: Detection, Documentation & Insurance Claims](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/hail-damage-to-epdm-roofing): Detecting hidden EPDM membrane and insulation damage and building the commercial claim.
- [How to File a Roof Insurance Claim After a Storm (Step-by-Step)](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/how-to-file-roof-insurance-claim): A step-by-step path from documenting damage to meeting the adjuster to collecting your check.
- [How Long Do I Have to File a Roof Insurance Claim?](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/how-long-to-file-roof-insurance-claim): Filing windows by state and carrier, exceptions, and how to avoid deadline-related denials.
- [What Is a Roofing Supplement and Why Do I Need One?](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/what-is-a-roofing-supplement): What a supplement is, why first estimates run low, what gets missed, and how to file one.
- [My Insurance Company Denied My Roof Claim — Now What?](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/insurance-denied-my-roof-claim): How to read the denial, gather evidence, and reopen a claim with documentation the carrier can't ignore.
- [Insurance Didn't Pay Enough to Replace My Roof — What to Do](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/insurance-didnt-pay-enough-for-roof): Supplements, missing line items, and code upgrades to recover what an underpaid roof claim owes you.
- [Adjuster Missed Damage on My Roof — What to Do Next](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/adjuster-missed-damage-on-my-roof): What adjusters commonly miss, how to request a re-inspection, and how to document overlooked damage.
- [Contractor Says I Have Hail Damage But I Don't See It](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/contractor-says-hail-damage-but-i-dont-see-it): What inspectors look for that's invisible from the ground, and how independent analysis confirms damage.
- [What Is an AOB (Assignment of Benefits) for Roofing?](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/what-is-aob-assignment-of-benefits-roofing): How AOBs work, the pros and cons, state laws, and how digital signing streamlines them.
- [How to Automate Insurance Invoicing for Roofing Contractors](https://www.dumbroof.ai/learn/how-to-automate-insurance-invoicing): Automating insurance invoicing with CRM integrations, QuickBooks syncing, and AI documentation.

## Comparisons
How DumbRoof compares to other approaches and tools roofers use. Many are complementary — measurements (EagleView, Hover) and photos (CompanyCam) feed INTO DumbRoof, and a CRM (AccuLynx, JobNimbus) can sit alongside it.

- [DumbRoof Comparisons (hub)](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare): Honest, factual breakdowns of where DumbRoof fits vs public adjusters, DIY supplements, Xactimate, and adjacent roofing/claims software.
- [DumbRoof vs Hiring a Public Adjuster](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-hiring-a-public-adjuster): Software you run yourself vs a licensed professional you hire on contingency — cost, control, and when each makes sense.
- [DumbRoof vs DIY Roof Claim Supplement](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-diy-roof-claim-supplement): Hand-building a supplement in spreadsheets and Word vs AI-generating a forensic, code-cited package in minutes.
- [Best Xactimate Alternative for Roofers](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/best-xactimate-alternative-for-roofers): Xactimate is the carrier-side estimating standard; how roofers produce Xactimate-style supplement estimates without the learning curve.
- [DumbRoof vs Roofr](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-roofr): Roofr is a roofing sales/measurement and proposal platform; DumbRoof is insurance-supplement software. Where each fits and how they overlap.
- [DumbRoof vs AccuLynx](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-acculynx): AccuLynx is a roofing CRM that runs the whole business; DumbRoof builds the carrier-ready supplement. Use them together.
- [DumbRoof vs JobNimbus](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-jobnimbus): JobNimbus is a roofing CRM and pipeline; DumbRoof generates the forensic supplement. How the two complement each other.
- [DumbRoof vs CompanyCam](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-companycam): CompanyCam captures and organizes job-site photos; DumbRoof turns those photos plus the carrier scope into a supplement.
- [DumbRoof vs EagleView](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-eagleview): EagleView delivers aerial roof measurements; DumbRoof uses measurements (from EagleView or elsewhere) to build the supplement.
- [DumbRoof vs Hover](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-hover): Hover builds 3D measurement models from phone photos; DumbRoof consumes measurements to generate the forensic supplement.
- [DumbRoof vs Symbility](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-symbility): Symbility is a claims-estimating platform used carrier-side; DumbRoof is contractor-side software that builds the supplement to send back.
- [DumbRoof vs ServiceTitan](https://www.dumbroof.ai/compare/dumbroof-vs-servicetitan): ServiceTitan is a broad field-service platform; DumbRoof is purpose-built for roofing insurance supplements.

## Locations
State-by-state roof insurance claim guides for the top storm, hail, and wind states. Each page covers the state's storm profile, building-code basis, claim-deadline norms, any matching rule, hurricane/wind deductibles, and the Department of Insurance complaint path. General information, not legal advice.
- [Roof Insurance Claim Help by State (hub)](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help): Index of all state guides, grouped by region.
- [Texas](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/texas): Hail, wind, Gulf hurricanes; suit-limitation deadlines; hurricane deductibles; TDI.
- [Oklahoma](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/oklahoma): Core hail-alley hail and tornadic wind; Oklahoma Insurance Department.
- [Kansas](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/kansas): Central hail-alley hail and wind; Kansas Insurance Department.
- [Nebraska](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/nebraska): Northern hail-alley hail and derecho wind; Nebraska Department of Insurance.
- [Colorado](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/colorado): Front Range hail; statutory matching protection (C.R.S. 10-4-110.8); Division of Insurance.
- [Florida](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/florida): Hurricanes; Florida Building Code; tightened 2022 claim-notice deadlines (1 yr report / 18 mo supplemental); hurricane deductibles; DFS/OIR.
- [Louisiana](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/louisiana): Gulf hurricanes; two-year minimum prescriptive period (R.S. 22:868); annual named-storm deductibles; LDI.
- [Alabama](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/alabama): Gulf coast + inland tornado/wind; six-year contract period; Alabama Department of Insurance.
- [Georgia](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/georgia): Severe storms + coastal wind; IRC w/ Georgia amendments; Georgia Office of Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner.
- [North Carolina](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/north-carolina): Coastal hurricanes + inland storms; three-year limitations period; NC Department of Insurance.
- [South Carolina](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/south-carolina): Atlantic hurricanes; regulated coastal wind/hail deductibles; three-year period; SC Department of Insurance.
- [Tennessee](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/tennessee): 'Dixie Alley' wind and hail; six-year contract period; Tennessee Department of Commerce and Insurance.
- [Missouri](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/missouri): Severe hail; matching regulation (20 CSR 100-1.050); ten-year written-contract period; Department of Commerce and Insurance.
- [Minnesota](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/minnesota): Severe hail; statutory matching protection (Minn. Stat. 65A.10); Department of Commerce.
- [Illinois](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/illinois): Severe storms and hail; ten-year written-contract period; Illinois Department of Insurance.
- [Ohio](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/ohio): Severe storms/hail; short (often 1-year) policy suit-limitation clauses; Ohio Department of Insurance.
- [New York](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/new-york): Wind/hail/coastal storms; two-year standard-fire-policy suit-limitation; RCNYS; DFS.
- [Pennsylvania](https://www.dumbroof.ai/roof-insurance-claim-help/pennsylvania): Wind/hail/remnant storms; four-year contract period; PA Uniform Construction Code; Pennsylvania Insurance Department.
